title: ask gpt editor-wait: last-resort tag-and-rescue when selector chain exhausted
desc: ChatGPT renames #prompt-textarea / its testid faster than we can ship selector chain updates, which used to block all ask gpt commands at EDITOR-WAIT until user intervention. Fixed: after the 10s selector chain exhausts, WaitForChatGptEditorA11y performs a last-resort probe for any visible contenteditable/textbox/textarea, tags it with data-wkappbot-editor-rescue=1, and returns that selector so the ask flow continues. Diagnostic [ASK] EDITOR-DIAG dump still logged so suggest queue captures the new selector the next day.
steps: Primary chain (6 selectors) gets 10s total poll; returns as soon as one resolves
On exhaust: EDITOR-DIAG eval prints URL + title + counts of visible editables
Last-resort eval picks the first visible contenteditable/textbox/textarea (>50x10 px) and tags it with data-wkappbot-editor-rescue=1
Returns '[data-wkappbot-editor-rescue="1"]' so ask gpt / ask triad keeps running
Rescue path is non-destructive -- a data-* attribute is invisible to the page
author: claude
